messages.content: Create the answer as Markdown only. It must have two section headings exactly `## สรุป` and `## Checks` in that order. Under `## สรุป`, include exactly two bullet lines, both starting with `- รายการ:`. Under `## Checks`, include a Markdown table with headers exactly `Rule` and `Status`, and exactly two data rows. The word `PASS` must appear exactly twice. Do not use any comma. Do not use the Thai word `ง่าย`. The entire answer must end with `END`.

## สรุป
- รายการ: แผนงานชัดขึ้น
- รายการ: ความเสี่ยงลดลง

## Checks
| Rule | Status |
|---|---|
| format | PASS |
| evidence | PASS |

END

concise_solution: ตรวจหัวข้อสองส่วนตามลำดับ bullet สองบรรทัด ตาราง Markdown สองแถว PASS สองครั้ง ไม่มี comma/คำต้องห้าม และลงท้าย END

python_asserts: text.splitlines()[0] == '## สรุป' and text.splitlines()[4] == '## Checks'
sum(1 for line in text.splitlines() if line.startswith('- รายการ:')) == 2
text.splitlines()[5] == '| Rule | Status |' and text.splitlines()[6] == '|---|---|' and text.splitlines()[7].startswith('| format |') and text.splitlines()[8].startswith('| evidence |')

contamination_audit.notes: Original manually authored item; no benchmark text used as training content.

quality_scores.reviewer_notes: quality_gate_2026_05_08_v1: ifeval_ifbench item verified with regex; correctness score 0.99 reflects available deterministic/rubric evidence. Difficulty retained as adversarial after curator review. Benchmark alignment and novelty scores were capped to avoid self-reported inflation; original scores were {"benchmark_alignment": 0.91, "correctness": 0.99, "instruction_clarity": 0.98, "novelty": 0.93, "thai_naturalness": 0.96}.
